description_long: This is a three-seater sofa with a minimalist, mid-century modern design, featuring a wooden frame and armrests. The seat and backrest are each divided into three individual, rectangular cushions upholstered in a smooth, light gray fabric. The wooden frame is visible along the sides, arms, and base, with a warm brown finish that contrasts with the neutral upholstery. The armrests are straight and unpadded, matching the angular, clean lines of the frame. The backrest is high and straight, providing full support for seated users. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A three-seater sofa with a wooden frame and light gray, rectangular cushions, featuring a minimalist, mid-century modern style. The design includes straight wooden armrests and a high, segmented backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing three individual seat and back cushions, straight wooden armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the angular wooden armrest and leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel covered in gray upholstery and the wooden frame outlining the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the profile of the cushions and the wooden armrest and leg design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all rectangular, uniform in size, and appearing to be loose but well-fitted.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, unpadded wooden armrests at seat height, extending from the front legs to the backrest, with a simple, angular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four exposed wooden legs, one at each corner, integrated into the frame with a straight, block-like profile and a natural wood finish.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest divided into three vertical segments, each with a separate cushion, providing full back support and a clean, modern look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
